instructions.text: Use `npm create astro@latest -- --template starlight` to scaffold a new Starlight project
Use `npx astro add starlight` to add Starlight to an existing Astro project
All Starlight options live inside `starlight({})` in `astro.config.mjs`
Content pages must be placed under `src/content/docs/`
File paths under `src/content/docs/` map 1:1 to URL routes
Sidebar `slug` values must not have leading slashes or file extensions
original_snippets: NEVER hard-code sidebar slugs with leading slashes

instructions.text: Use `items` for explicit sidebar entries and `autogenerate` for directory-based entries ‚Äî never mix both in the same group
Set `site` URL at `defineConfig` level (not inside `starlight({})`) for sitemap generation
Use either `logo.src` alone or `logo.light` + `logo.dark` together ‚Äî they are mutually exclusive
Set `replacesTitle: true` on `logo` when the logo image already includes the site name
Use `draft: true` in frontmatter to exclude pages from production builds
Use `template: splash` for full-width landing pages without sidebars
Run `npx @astrojs/upgrade` to keep Starlight up to date
Sidebar entries and page routing are independent ‚Äî a page can exist without a sidebar entry and vice versa
